model.name: sfmgr:smartFolderManagerModel
model.description: Hyland Smart Folder Manager Content Model
model.author: Hyland

aspect.name: sfmgr:templateMetadata
aspect.title: Smart Folder Manager Template Metadata
aspect.description: Applied to smart folder template nodes to track deployment state

property.name: sfmgr:associatedType
property.title: Associated Content Type
property.description: The primary content type this template is designed for, e.g. cm:content

property.name: sfmgr:deployed
property.title: Deployed
property.description: Whether this template has been activated as a smart folder template
